requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: Quotations are to include a PDF copy of the Supplier’s Deed of Undertaking in the form attached duly signed by the Supplier.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier’s Quotation is to include pricing on the basis of: Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), Combination of T&M and Fixed Price, Other.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: The criteria that the Commonwealth will use to evaluate the Quotation comprises the following: Methodology, Past Performance, Technical Merit, Pricing, Compliance.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: Quotations are to be lodged electronically via AusTender (https://www.tenders.gov.au) before the Closing Time in accordance with the Quotation lodgement procedures set out in this RFQ and on AusTender.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier’s performance against the Performance Measures will be measured under the Work Order and may impact the Supplier’s entitlement to any At Risk Amount or the Commonwealth’s entitlement to any Service Credits.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier agrees and acknowledges that it must complete and submit for Approval either: an AIC Schedule, in the format set out in Annexure F or as otherwise specified by the Commonwealth, if the Work Order value (inclusive of all extensions and variations) including GST is between $4M and $20M; or an AIC Plan, in the format set out in Annexure G or as otherwise specified by the Commonwealth, if the Work Order value (inclusive of all extensions and variations) including GST exceeds $20M.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier must deliver the following Plans: Australian Industry Capability (AIC) Plan, Transition-In Plan, Phase-Out Plan, Supplier Risk Management Plan, Service Management Plan, Disaster Recovery Plan, Test Plan.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier must deliver a Test Plan to the Commonwealth for Approval in accordance with clause 3.19 of the COD and Annexure P to this SOW by the date(s) specified in the Milestone/Deliverable table in clause 6 of the SOW.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier must provide Performance Reports to the Commonwealth, which detail the Supplier’s assessment of its own performance against, and compliance with, the Performance Measures, the Deed and the Work Order.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: Sustainment of eTools and DDM must be undertaken from a Physical Zone 3 (as certified under the DSPF) or higher site.
